page_metadata.biotools__summary: Chord is an R package to remove single cells Doublets by integrating tools. Chord uses the AdBoost algorithm to integrate different methods for stable and accurate doublets filtered results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Chord is an R package to remove single cells Doublets by integrating tools. Chord uses the AdBoost algorithm to integrate different methods for stable and accurate doublets filtered results.
